AB sees the dollar benefiting from safe-haven flows while the Iran conflict stays intense, a near-term positive, with the path thereafter the acknowledged counterpoint. AB argues markets over-price tightening from the oil shock so yields should fall over time, an implicitly constructive call on duration; no geography stated so snapped to the generic Duration leaf. Two-sided rate path — ECB at neutral/on hold with increased near-term hike risk, then cuts (10-yr forecast eases 3.00→2.60) — nets to a neutral stance on euro duration. Evidence: European Central Bank (ECB) policy is at neutral and remains on hold for now. Risks of hikes have increased but are conditional on the level of energy prices at their June meeting. For now, the ECB can afford to wait and assess the upcoming data as well as the geopolitical evolutions.. Locator: p.6. Checker: unconfirmed (The quoted evidence says ECB policy is neutral/on hold with conditional hike risk, but does not itself establish a neutral Euro government bond view.).

With spreads historically narrow leaving little compensation for risk, JPM deliberately moves up in credit quality, especially within the European bank capital structure. Evidence: The group also saw an opportunity to go up in credit quality at a time when spreads generally remain narrow compared with history, especially across the European banking capital structure.. Locator: p.3.

The explicit up-in-quality move, taken because narrow spreads underpay for risk, is the mirror-image underweight of lower-quality issuers. Evidence: The group also saw an opportunity to go up in credit quality at a time when spreads generally remain narrow compared with history, especially across the European banking capital structure.. Locator: p.3.
